expectations.text: Has a customer/user anchor at high visibility (>=0.9)
Every component has [visibility, evolution] coordinates in [0,1]
Visibility constraint respected: for every edge a->b, nu(a) >= nu(b)
Uses canonical stage naming (+utility or +rental appears)
Strategic analysis present (covers D, K, R)
Cites at least one specific Wardley gameplay by name
expectations.evidence: cites: Focus on user needs, Open Approaches, Co-operation

expectations.text: Caveat present that evolution is not time/maturity (scenario not forecast)
